payload.reason: The technical direction is mostly compatible with the baseline, but the ADR conflicts with accepted ADR 0009 as written. ADR 0009 accepts stdio multi-session because the file event log supposedly serializes appends and reloads state per MCP call; this ADR says that mechanism is unsafe and replaces it with SQLite, but only supersedes the unaccepted snapshot proposal. It must explicitly supersede or amend ADR 0009, and likely ADR 0008 if the EventEnvelope/filename export format or replay semantics change. Also define canonical JSON export ordering/atomicity for multi-stream eventcore commands; the proposed single max-sequence pre-commit check does not fit per-stream optimistic concurrency and risks treating derived SQLite state as authoritative.
